prompt: Describe what happens at a farmers market. Do not use any adjectives or adverbs. Use only nouns, verbs, prepositions, articles, and pronouns.
response: People come to a farmers market. Farmers bring fruits, vegetables, eggs, bread, cheese, flowers, and meat. Vendors set up tables and tents. Buyers walk through rows and look at food and plants. People ask questions and talk with farmers. Farmers tell stories about farms, crops, weather, and harvests. Buyers pick items and put them in bags and baskets. Vendors weigh produce and take cash and cards. Children eat snacks and drink juice. Musicians play songs. Friends meet and talk. People stand in lines and wait for turns. Sellers pack purchases and hand them to buyers. People leave with food and flowers.
